title: helianthemum × mansanetianum nothosubsp. mansanetianum
intro: Helianthemum × mansanetianum nothosubsp. mansanetianum is a hybrid plant species in the family Cistaceae, commonly known as Rockrose. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, contributing to its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Rockrose has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
